violations.text: Raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tomato) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Proper storage reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Tomato cucumber mix was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cucumber mix recently was placed in prep unit. Mix was relocated to rapidly cool. TCS foods should not be stored above the cold hold line in prep unit. Proper storage reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Chicken was observed thawing on the the shelf. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Proper thawing procedures reviewed with PIC. Chicken was placed in refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector discussed proper labeling with PIC. PIC relocated containers of food behind counter. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The floor in the basement was observed with miscellaneous debris. Establishment to clean under shelving and pallets in basement. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Per PIC, application was mailed a week ago. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tomato) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Handout provided. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of the slicer was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Various foods were observed held at 47-53 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The walk-in refrigerator was observed not in good repair. Ambient temperature was observed at 49 degrees. All food inside was elevated temperature. Unit must not be used for any TCS foods until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Raw animal foods (beef and eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must not be used until washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Lamb was observed held at 112 degrees Fahrenheit on the stove top. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was recently cooked on stove top. Food was reheated at the time of inspection. Stove top must be set to high enough heat to hot hold food above 135. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Fish was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Fish was relocated to walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Various deserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of rodent droppings in the basement area.. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Reach-In refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The hand sink in the ware washing area is in poor repair. (leaks when in use) Multiple holes were observed in the basement. Holes shall be sealed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
